title: Mental Health Drop In Centers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Mental Health Drop In Centers 12 Matching Service Providers BENTON COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH BENTON COUNTY CRISIS CENTER DROP-IN COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers same day mental health crisis counseling services. 240 NW 4th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 766-6767 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES MADRAS MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES OPEN ACCESS CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Drop-in center for new clients. Provides a safe, supportive environment where mental health clients can drop in for formal and informal contacts with staff and other clients. The purpose of these contacts is for clients to feel better about themselves while they learn to manage and to recover from their illness. Offer appropriate activities conducive to positive mental health outcomes. 850 SW 4th Street Suite 302 Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday 8:30am-5pm, Wednesday/Thursday 1pm-5pm Email (541) 475-6575 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADIA HEALTH CASCADIA PLAZA HEALTH CENTER MENTAL HEALTH URGENT WALK-IN CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides care to those experiencing a behavioral health crisis. Services are based on clinical need and may include counseling, prescribing medications, and referrals to affordable mental health, medical, and substance treatment and other community resources. 4212 SE Division Street Suites 100 and 200 Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-9pm, Saturday-Sunday 9am-9pm Email (503) 963-2575 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH DIVISION CLACKAMAS MENTAL HEALTH CENTER CRISIS AND URGENT WALK-IN SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an urgent mental health walk-in center. Offers crisis stabilization services including counselors, peer support, case management, crisis intake assessment, referral to medical services and general resources. 11211 SE 82nd Avenue Suite O Happy Valley, OR 97086 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Crisis and Support line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Walk-in Mental Health Center: Monday-Friday 9am-7pm Mobile Crisis Response: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 655-8585 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FOLKTIME INC FOLKTIME Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Member-run social program and drop-in center for adults with a mental health diagnosis. Programs include craft projects, games, guest speakers, and discussions on current topics of interest. Hot lunches prepared and shared on site. 4837 NE Couch Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Age 18 and older individuals who identify as having lived experience with mental health and substance use challenges. Potential attendees should be committed to recovery and participation in a positive community and have no recent or ongoing history of violence. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 10am-2pm; meals served at noon Email (503) 238-6428 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FOLKTIME INC FOLKTIME INC OREGON CITY FOLKTIME Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers peer run drop-in programs designed for anyone who self-identifies as having lived experience with mental health or substance use challenges. Peer support specialists work alongside peers, empowering them to lead and create environments focused on wellness and recovery. 710 6th Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Age 18 and older individuals who identify as having lived experience with mental health and substance use challenges. Potential attendees should be committed to recovery and participation in a positive community and have no recent or ongoing history of violence. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday/Friday 10am-2pm; meals served at noon Email (971) 888-1784 Get Directions Visit Website More Details POLK COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH POLK COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH DALLAS POLK CARES CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health drop-in services, including suicide prevention, safety planning, and information and referrals to community resources and ongoing care. Also supports recovery from substance use, with treatment referrals and overdose prevention education. 182 SW Academy Street Suite 333 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed on holidays (503) 623-9289 1 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RECOVERY OUTREACH COMMUNITY CENTER SALEM DROP-IN CENTER AND CONFERENCE ROOM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center for individuals experiencing mental health or addiction challenges. Offers a safe space to talk about trauma, anxiety, emotions, and other personal topics while supporting recovery. Daily activities include yoga, art, walking, games, internet access, and socializing. Monthly group outings are also available. 1190 Broadway Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Saturday/Sunday 11am-4pm Tuesday 12pm-5pm Email (503) 393-4273 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RECOVERY OUTREACH COMMUNITY CENTER SOCC DROP-IN CENTER AND CONFERENCE ROOM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center for individuals experiencing mental health or addiction challenges. Offers a safe space to talk about trauma, anxiety, emotions, and other personal topics while supporting recovery. Daily activities include yoga, art, walking, games, internet access, and socializing. Monthly group outings are also available. 280 NE Santiam Boulevard Mill City, OR 97360 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 12am-5pm Email (503) 392-4276 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WASHINGTON COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER HAWTHORN WALK-IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides urgent care services for mental health and addiction concerns. Services include assessment for mental health and/or addiction concerns, crisis counseling, information and referral, education on mental health and addiction, peer support, and connection to treatment providers. Concerned loved ones may also receive support and information about available community services. 5250 NE Elam Young Parkway Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-7pm, Saturday/Sunday 10am-4pm (503) 846-2288 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP YOUTH OUTREACH SERVICES YOUTH OUTREACH DROP-IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a youth center with access to academic supports, mental health supports, employment assistance, after-school activities, food such as snacks and staple items, clothing, hygiene supplies, and information and referral relating to in-house shelter services. 719 E 1st Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Ages 11-24 Hours: Drop in: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon Appointment only: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday noon-8pm, Wednesday 9am-8pm, (503) 472-0457 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP YOUTH OUTREACH SERVICES activities, food such as snacks and staple items, clothing, hygiene supplies, and information and referral relating to in-house shelter services. 335 NE 6th Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility:
